entry.title: Re: Fiori Currency Conversion Issue
entry.content:
I think I am unable to clearly state my requirement. For JPY, I want to show correct value, using annotations. How to do it?  guess i'm using wrong annotation.

Value Stored JPY : 15494732.37 

Value Shown : 1549473.237

Value should be shown : 1549473237 ( if without decimal val currency).

Yes TCURC/TCURX has custom values for custom currencies. 

And again, thanks for your reply and link to blog 🙂

entry.title: Times recordings are always sent to project manager for approval, not to the Task Responsible
entry.content:
An employee records time on a project task and releases them. You find that these times recordings are always sent to project manager for approval, not to the Person Responsible at task level.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Times recordings are always sent to project manager f...
entry.content:
All the time and expenses incurred on the project is always needed to be approved by the project manager, not by the Task person responsible.

Irrespective of the person responsible on the task level, all the time recordings will be sent to the project manager (who is responsible for the entire project).

Hence all the project time recordings are always sent to project manager for approval.

Please refer KBA: https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2666757

entry.title: SAP error
entry.content:
Error Message:

Outbound Delivery not created!
An item with no delivery quantity is not permitted. Item will be deleted.
No instance of object type OutboundDelivery has been created. External re


The sale only generated the Purchasing Doc. but fails to generate the delivery.
Any advice on how to proceed?

- stock checked through MMBE that is also available in unrestricted us

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP not allowing to delete DN
entry.content: SAP not allowing to delete DN that did not ship, but SAP is showing packaging unit

entry.title: Re: Request ID in Replication Flows
entry.content: Hi Tobias, so you have a scheduled replication flow which runs every hour? Then schedule it via Task Chain. If you have the replication flow set for permanent / real-time then you will need some DB trigger based function, else you can use the data flow, but with my described way to fetch the 'request ID' from a custom table. Br, Martin

entry.title: Dimension Hierarchy Dropdown total
entry.content: I have a dimension ( Called "Fonte de financiamento", whitch has 3 "children" "RP", "RG", and "OE", than it has the other children of this 3 things) in a row on DropDown level 1 showing all totals ( I selected on Show/Hide of the dimesion ), but when i select level 2 dropdown, the totals dissapears. When i use drop down on one of those 3, it continues to appear, but when i select 2, the totals do the same and dissapear. What is the problem, and how can i fix it?

entry.title: Re: WBS - Project with Revenue - Margin Analysis not updated
entry.content: Hi Owen/SAP Team, could you please help to resolve issue, based on the screenshots provided?

entry.title: Re: Making an OnPremise ABAP CI/CD with Github Actions
entry.content:
Yes, TRM focus is delivery of add-ons.

This demo has the propagation to what in a real life environment would be customer systems, however this step can also be skipped depending on what you're working with.

If you got any questions regarding TRM feel free to reach out to me!

entry.title: Re: Returning Excel with a CAP service
entry.content: I have tried creating the stream the same way, as in lines 14f, but it get the same issue that the data from the stream is not actually read, but returned as 'value: "[object Readable]"'. For reference, I am using CDS version 8.3.0

entry.title: Where can I learn how to move from an existing Data Warehouse landscape to SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Modernizing Your Data Warehouse Landscape – From SAP BW to SAP Datasphere learning journey.

Overview
In this Learning Journey, you will learn which scenarios exist to leverage current investment and modernize your data warehouse landscape. Your main options are the greenfield approach, the hybrid approach with SAP BW/4HANA or SAP S/4HANA, and the migration and conversion approach to SAP BW bridge. You will learn about use cases, value propositions, and steps for these approaches. The learning journey contains step-by-step procedures and videos explaining how you implement the connections and objects in a real system for each scenario.

Learning objectives
After completing this Learning Journey, you will be able to understand different paths and technological options to move from an existing Data Warehouse landscape based on SAP NetWeaver BW or SAP BW/4HANA to SAP Datasphere and SAP BW bridge.

Prerequisites

  • Exploring SAP Datasphere
  • Recommended:
    • Modeling in SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge
    • BW410
 

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Is there a report that defines the responsibilities of SAP in ECP?
entry.content: Hi Juergen, the link is now broken for the EC Payroll Service Catolog. Do you have a link to a newer version?

entry.title: Re: How long does it take to confirm a payment for certif...
entry.content:
Hi @praveen7304 
An agent is currently processing your ticket and is analyzing why the access code has not yet been sent to you for redemption.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: New Community Package: A Cloud Integration Alternative for SAP Process Orchestration Adapter Mod
entry.content:
Good to see the effort in making it easier to migrate. 

I would imagine the IDOC to Flat would be an iflow with process direct that could cache the Meta data. 

Daniel

entry.title: SAP GRC New Certification Launch
entry.content:
Hi, 

Does anyone have an idea when SAP will launch SAP GRC new Certification? 

The old certification has been on hold for quite time. 

Would appreciate an early response. Thanks.

Regards,

Wajahat 

#grc #

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • First generation college students
    • People looking to switch their careers mid-life
    • People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves

I am a Mechanical Engineer career shifter from a Manufacturing Team Leader to Business Architecture Analyst. I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification. I will start learning more on SAP PP/QM Training modules.

Thank you

Efrenel

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities
entry.content:
Hi @thomas_jung ,

Any issue with points update in gameboard? Points are not getting updated.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Currency Conversion Issue
entry.content:
Ok so I see your issue now. Thank you for the clarification!

Recommend you first double-check your custom currency code is working correctly by running report RCURTEST in GUI to check. See SAP Note 2561100 - Currency Conversion in CDS Queries - Could not determine valid conversion rate for value(s) ...

Assuming this is ok... then as explained in the ABAP CDS keyword documentation for amounts https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_758_index_htm/7.58/en-US/index.htm?file=abencds_amount_field.htm yes you do need to apply the mandatory  annotation @Semantics.amount.currencyCode : true to the currency code field

I'm not sure why you think it's unusable though? It's just commented out... You should un-comment the line and reactivate the CDS View. 

That should solve it. Remember you can have multiple annotations before a field.

entry.title: Help with our Project
entry.content: I was just hoping somebody could help me with our project but I guess this community is not friendly enough to help students like us with our project. I already deleted my previous post but thanks anyway.

entry.title: S/4 HANA Application job scheduling based on condition/event
entry.content:
Hi,

S/4 HANA private cloud system.

We are checking the option to schedule the S/4 HANA application job based on some condition/event because we are having some dependency from other systems job completion status (SuccessFactor, IBP, etc.,) .

We didn't see the event/condition based scheduling options in Application Jobs FIORI app.

Is there any possibility to start S/4 HANA application jobs based on completion of dependency jobs from other systems?

Best Regards,

Anand

entry.title: Re: Bulk PDF Generation [thousands of unique customer sta...
entry.content: Could you share with us the approximate cost for licensing InfoBurst?

entry.title: Re: Excel template in BTP BAS tool giving error when depl...
entry.content:
You need to add the file .Ui5RepositoryTextFiles in the webapp folder and add the extension you would like to add

 

^.*.csv$
^.*.jpeg$

 

Example:

https://github.com/spreadsheetimporter/packed-deployment-abap/blob/main/webapp/.Ui5RepositoryTextFiles

Perhaps it's worth looking at  dylan-drummond's blog 
Notes on installing SAPGUI for Java for macOS 

From the screenshot it looks like their may be an SNC related library missing but I'm sure Dylan's blog will be more helpful than that.

Gavin

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities
entry.content: @DeoKumar What badges do you think you are missing? I can't report issues unless I know what to report.

entry.title: Packing specifications SAP EWM
entry.content:
I have a requirement that packing required for a product1 that received from Vendor1 and no packing for the same product1 from different vendor2 before final putaway.

what settings that required to pack and no pack for the same product from two different vendors?

entry.title: Error: update-rc.d: error: unkown option
entry.content:
An error occurred during the installation of the SAP HANA Server:

Error checking sapinit
   Starting external program update-rc.d
      Command line is: update-rc.d -n sapinit defaults
      Output line 1: update-rc.d: error: unkown option
      Output line 2: usage: update-rc.d [-f] <basename> remove
      Output line 3:        update-rc.d [-f] <basename> defaults
      Output line 4:        update-rc.d [-f] <basename> defaults-disabled
      Output line 5:        update-rc.d <basename> disable|enable [S|2|3|4|5]
      Output line 6:            -f: force
      Output line 7:
      Output line 8: The disable|enable API is not stable and might change in the future.
      Program terminted with exit code 1

The server is running on Debian 12. I have already tried the workaround without success.

Are there any ideas or solutions to solve the problem?

entry.title: Re: TM 9.4, VSR_1STEP doesn't consider single resource assignment to carrier
entry.content: Hi, Have you found the solution where VSR consider owner of the resource? Where owner is a carrier.

entry.title: Re: Files in the change folder are not loaded when I deploy
entry.content: Those files are coming from lrep. In the flpsandbox.js it is maybe mocked. Are you sure that lrep is connected on your FLP? Is there a error message in the console that may relate to that?

entry.title: Re: how to add column in mdc table in sapui5 visual editor?
entry.content: Depends on the app, but it maybe easier to do all that on the backend with CDS extension?

entry.title: Re: Realtime (delta) Data Replication from SAP Analytics Cloud to BW/4 HANA
entry.content:
@andreas_tidl2 

it is not clear 100 mio records from SAC to BW is the initial loading or delta. I assume it is initial loading and that is not a very high value. I suggest you start with DP Agent memory 12 GB and monitor the hardware usage closely afterwards.

 

 

regards

Zili

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities
entry.content: Create a process condition

Regards, 

Preethi

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities
entry.content: Run the business process

entry.title: Re: Realtime (delta) Data Replication from SAP Analytics Cloud to BW/4 HANA
entry.content:
@Alex_Acc 

there is no SDI solution from BW write to SAC. I assume you still use the old way to push high volume of data from BW into SAC, which performance is a known issue.

you can refer below about the new Data Import service in SAC. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/using-the-new-sap-analytics-cloud-data-import-service-to-push-data-from/ba-p/13575101

 

regards

Zili

 Kind Regards,
HH

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities
entry.content: In learn about SAP Event mesh

entry.title: We are not able to create MRP data in SAP S/4Hana Cloud through the MATMAS Idoc Interface.
entry.content:
We are unable to create MRP views to sap Cloud Public edition via the MATMAS interface. 

 

What needs to be maintained in the idoc if its maintained with a manually and not through the app Send Material ( BD10 ) ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: We are not able to create MRP data in SAP S/4Hana Clo...
entry.content:
What views are determined for a material depend of the value of the field PSTAT  ( Maintenance Status ) in the segments E1MARAM and E1MARCM

 

For the MRP views the Maintenance Status D needs to be maintained .

 

For example :

E1MARAM with KD is Basic Data View and MRP view at Client Level

E1MARCM with D is MRP at Plant Level

entry.title: Re: Packing specifications SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi 

 

Try to maintain vendor in ship from. Hope it pack as per vendor 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Where can I start learning the functionalities of SAP Field Service Management solutions?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Managing SAP Field Service Management learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey will guide you through the main functionalities and concepts of SAP Field Service Management, providing an in-depth understanding of key business scenarios in the field service management domain. SAP Field Service Management supports field service technicians and dispatchers with real-time, automated workforce scheduling, planning, and dispatching for employees and partners, as well as offering self-service options for field service needs.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, business users will be able to:

  • Understand the functionality of SAP Field Service Management solutions, including both web and mobile applications.
  • Manage master data effectively.
  • Configure and perform planning and dispatching tasks.
  • Work with smartforms and utilize mobile field service functionalities.

Prerequisites

  • Master Data Management
  • Planning and Dispatching
  • Mobile Field Service Applications
  • Smartforms

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: EBS: configuration of search string, part 1
entry.content:
Dear @Bohdan 

we have a requirement for Tag 86, when ever we upload the MT940 in the Incoming bank Line item assignment field should be updated with Tag 86 specific value.

for example - 86:LP IPSP2400EI8C3 ****Customer Name******* F 519000194066  

we need only 900019 (Customer number) should be updated in Assignment field of Incoming bank account.

Please help me to achieve this requirement

entry.title: Re: Custom field in service entry sheet Fiori App
entry.content:
The best solution is to identify the CDS OData services that populate that table and create a CDS extension. Most of the time, when you extend the CDS, the Fiori app automatically incorporates the extension as well. Take a look at this blog for more details: Extending CDS Views

I cannot provide more specific details as I do not have access to the app, but I have successfully implemented similar solutions multiple times.

Sebastiano

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content:
Blocked based Programming Environment - Snap! -

on maximum number of Screens!

Start Snap!

entry.title: Re: How PRod / Preview datacenter can have a feature down...
entry.content: Patch was deployed to all DCs early this morning.  Please update your cases if you are still seeing an issue.

entry.title: Re: The user's s/4hana public cloud system display is inc...
entry.content:
Hello @WendyDu 

 

A Material is only logical deleted if its marked for Deletion . the deletion flag can be removed in the Product Master again .

To prevent the material from being used you can set the material status to blocked

If you dont want the material to be displayed in the Manage Product Master Data app then archiving using the

object MM_MATNR is the only option

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: select query with for all entries not fetching the re...
entry.content: Hi @vieet , looks like your question has been answered. Let us know if you need anything else.

entry.title: Re: SAP not allowing to delete DN
entry.content:
Hello @Karthik34 

I guess it's not packaging but handling unit that prevents delivery deletion. You need to delete handling units first from the delivery packing screen, then you'd able to delete the delivery itself.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Monitoring in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)
entry.content:
You can refer to the official documentation which is quite well explained:
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/message-status

And the Monitoring section in general:
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/monitoring

Inside of this section there is the Guidelines and Best Practices for Message Monitoring:
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/guidelines-and-best-practices-for-message-monitoring

It should definitely help 😉

BR, Stan.

entry.content:

I also copied the content of file to Notepad++ and I see there is no problem - each line in excel is copied as separate line in Notepad++ .

Any hints on what is going wrong in this file upload as there is no clear description of error

Hopefully someone has some time to help you.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
I’m Arsala, a dedicated SAP SuccessFactors consultant with two years of experience in delivering cutting-edge HR solutions. My expertise in leveraging SuccessFactors modules has enabled me to enhance organizational efficiency and drive strategic HR initiatives effectively. With a solid foundation in configuring and implementing various SuccessFactors components, including PMGM, EC Payroll, Time Management and EC, I bring both technical proficiency and a passion for innovation to every project.

My experience has honed my ability to address complex challenges and deliver impactful results. I thrive in collaborative environments and am committed to continuous learning to stay ahead of industry trends. Joining the SAP Digital Initiatives Program would be the perfect opportunity for me to combine my expertise with cutting-edge technology to revolutionize HR processes in various industries. I look forward to contributing to transformative HR projects and supporting organizational growth through tailored SuccessFactors solutions.

thanks and kind regards
Karin

entry.title: Re: can be closed
entry.content:
Hello @urb 

Check if the note 1492431 - stock change before count. Inv not cleared or wrong quantity helps. Otherwise report the issue to SAP support.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

And BAPI_ROLE_ACTGROUP_ASSIGN is just for user assign role, and BAPI_ROLE_SAVE not exist, and i want to use Bapi remotely.. If there is any existing in sap or what bapi do I need to develop to get it.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Upload Excel using SAP RAP Only
entry.content: Very useful blog. Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: What we think about the second meetup in New York
entry.content:
A Look Back at Our Second NYC #SAP Meetup

We just had our second #SAP meetup in New York City, and it was fantastic! It was a smaller group this time, but everyone was really into SAP and excited to be there.

We planned to start the event two hours before sunset, which allowed us to enjoy the park's light and gave participants enough time to arrive. The park was an excellent choice for our meetup. Its quiet and comfortable atmosphere was perfect for us to get to know each other better and have meaningful conversations.

 

Meet Some of Our Attendees

One of the attendees, Richard, was especially excited. He’s currently an accountant in the fashion industry but is passionate about technology. He’s been learning about SAP FICO on his own after hearing about SAP's strength in big companies. He came to the meetup eager to meet others and grow his network.

Another attendee has recently moved to the U.S. and is a director at his company. Like many of us, he wasn’t born in the U.S., which added to our diverse mix. We ended up sharing stories about visas and the immigration process, which got quite a few laughs!

Despite our initial timing, we decided to stay longer because we had fluid conversations and a lot to talk about. We were a diverse group of developers, functional experts, data scientists, and Basis team members.

What’s Next?

We’re already planning a big event, probably a SIT, for this winter or next year and a relaxed get-together next month. Stay tuned for more details, and we hope to see you there! 
The goal is to find new attendees who are ready to share and be an event speakers.

In the end, thanks to everyone who came. The park's great location, your energy, and stories made this meetup special. Let's keep the spirit alive as we continue to learn and connect through SAP!

entry.title: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2409
entry.content:
In our latest release, we’ve made significant improvements to help you work smarter and faster, for example, we've simplified and enhanced the user experience in both risk and criticality assessments and RCM assessments. We've also introduced some great new features in recommendation management improving traceability with comments for status changes. Whether you're in the field or the office, these updates increase efficiency and usability across the board. Read on to learn more about all the new features!

 

Asset Risk Assessment

Enhanced UX for Risk & Criticality Assessments: Simplified Scale Definitions

We’re excited to unveil significant UX improvements for the the risk and criticality assessment. Previously, accessing essential scale definitions required multiple clicks, which was particularly cumbersome for users on tablets. To enhance the experience, we’ve introduced a new table view that seamlessly displays long descriptions directly within the assessment screen. This update eliminates the need for additional clicks and ensures a smoother, more efficient workflow, especially for those using tablets in the field.

This update not only streamlines the process but also integrates seamlessly with existing features, including the Financial Risk field, Notes section, and the 10x10 matrix. Looking ahead, it also accommodates the future requirement for Leading Failure Modes.

With these enhancements, Reliability Engineers can now view all relevant information in one place, improving efficiency and ease of use. This change reflects our commitment to refining user experience and responding to feedback, ensuring a more intuitive and effective assessment process.

Watch the video:

Asset Reliability Engineering

Select Multiple Recommendations for Rework and View Comments with Status Changes

You can now select multiple recommendations and simultaneously create a comment for all, enhancing both efficiency and the ability to track the history of the recommendation. Rework can be done for recommendations with status:

  • Released

  • Implementation in Process

With this, the recommendation will be set to status In Process and sent back to the Manage Recommendations application for reliability engineer to reprocess the recommendation. You can view the most recent comments on the list page using the Comment icon. 

Watch the video:

For more information, see the SAP Help Portal Implement Recommendations.

Enhanced Recommendation Management: Commenting on Status Changes

Recording comments during status changes provides context and traceability in recommendation management. The Information tab has a Comments section to view the recorded comments.

You can record comments for recommendation with the following statuses:

  • In Process → On Hold

  • In Process → Rejected

  • On Hold → In Process

  • For Review → In process

  • For Review → On Hold

  • For Review → Rejected

  • Ready for Release → In Process

  • Ready for Release → On Hold

  • Ready for Release → Released

You can also view the most recent comments by choosing the Comment icon on the list view page. 

Watch the video to see it in action:

Support Multiple Technical Objects in RCM Assessments

You can now select and assess multiple technical objects simultaneously as long as they share the same class, failure data profile, and planning plant details. For more information, see Assigning Technical Objects.

Watch the video: 

Improved UX in RCM Assessment - New Three Panel Layout

A three panel layout is used to display the failure data and associated evaluations. The Create or Edit Consequence Assessment buttons allow you to view the consequence evaluation using the third panel. On the Assessment page, there is an option to enter full screen mode. Watch the video to find out more:

APIS for FMEA Assessments

You can use public APIS to create, update, read, and delete FMEA assessments. For more information, see API Services.

 

Keep In Touch

Here's a quick reminder how to keep in touch with all things APM:

  • Check out all past and present Intelligent Asset Management webcasts here. If you register for an IAM webcast, you will be automatically subscribed to our IAM Community Engagement Newsletter. 
  • Check some of our recent blogs:
    • Why Failure-Mode Focus Matters in Intelligent Asset Management 
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2408
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2407 
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2406 
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2405 
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2404
    • SAP Asset Performance Management Embedding Cumulocity IoT to Drive Innovations in IoT and AI
    • How AI-based Anomaly Detection empowers reliability engineers in SAP Asset Performance Management
    • SAP Asset Performance Management – FMEA (Failure Mode and Effects Analysis)
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2403
  • Subscribe to What's New on the SAP Help Portal
  • Submit or vote for the improvement you would like to see in the SAP Continuous Influence session

See you again soon for the 2410 release update!

entry.title: Localization of simulations in SAP Companion
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a question regarding  the localization of simulations in SAP Companion.

I have both recorded simulations in English and in French relating to the same processes, and also set the appropriate language flags relating to the simulation’s languages.

In the Learning section of SAP Companion, when my FIORI interface is in English, I only see the English simulations, the French content is hidden, so in this case everything works fine.

Nevertheless, when I switch the UI to French, I see both English and French simulations, so the English content is not hidden in this case.

Is there something I could have forget to set?

entry.title: Re: why I count see my pr in the document flow after technical completion
entry.content: Purchase requisition

entry.title: Re: Control data for storage type is missing - Message no...
entry.content:
Hi community,

 

I faced the same issue, and Was due to an error because I removed an storage type and I forget to removed in the sequence for determining storage type for outboond deliveries.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Help with our Project
entry.content: I'm sorry that you don't want to post the errors and the criteria to have a good score.

entry.title: Re: SAP not allowing to delete DN
entry.content: Thanks Dominik for your reply. Can you please guide me how to delete handling unit

entry.title: Re: I want to have an app like CNMASSCREATE in S4 HANA Pr...
entry.content:
Most of the standard PS transactions have not been replaced by Fiori Apps, they will still work in Fiori.  Use the Fiori Apps Library to see what's new.

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/

There isn't a direct replacement for CNMASSCREATE . Go into Fiori, App Finder and select the SAP Menu tab and search for your transaction. It will find it.

entry.title: Re: Create Modify or delete role objects using BApi
entry.content: I'm not surprised, it was GenAI Assisted Content.

entry.title: Groups inside https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-application-cap-e2e.html do not open
entry.content: Groups inside "Build an Application End-to-End Using CAP, Node.js and VS Code" (https://developers.sap.com/mission.btp-application-cap-e2e.html) do not open.

entry.title: Re: How PRod / Preview datacenter can have a feature down...
entry.content:
Not the best move by SAP. I had a UAT testing session yesterday with a customer and we couldn't do much testing with onChange rule freezing everything.

As for the question on where to find info on patch for people who read the thread, I go here: https://community.sap.com/t5/patches/tkb-p/hxm-patches

I agree that there isn't enough info (and nothing on onChange rule and the lastest patch!) but it is a start to explain why my instances aren't behaving like usual!

Cheers,

Stéphanie

entry.title: Re: Cannot run "Run Data Mapping" in QS4
entry.content: Hi SalmanAhmed09, your question is too generic for this forum, please consider opening an incident for SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: SAP not allowing to delete DN
entry.content:
@Karthik34 Go to VL02N, enter the delivery number and push this button:

That will get you to the delivery packing screen. You can delete handling units there.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: Re: Link Service Job after MIGO
entry.content:
Hello @Cynthia_A 

You can't modify accounting details of a material document once it is posted. Even if you modify account assignment of the purchase order item, it will impact only material document posted afterwards, not the ones already posted.

You would need to cancel the material document, update the PO accounting assignment and post the material document again.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: A Practical Guide to Naming iFlows in SAP Cloud Integration (SCI)
entry.content:
In SAP Cloud Integration (SCI), naming iflows clearly and consistently is crucial for maintainability and support. A structured naming convention helps teams quickly understand an iflow’s purpose, its integration partners, and its data flow. At CLAIMATE Tech, we follow a well-defined approach to naming our iflows, and here’s our guide to making it work for you.

Our Naming Template

We use the following format for naming iflows in SCI:

SCI<iflowid>_<direction>_<iflowdesc>

Each part of this structure serves a specific purpose. Let’s break it down:

 

SCI<iflowid>

The unique identifier of the iflow.

  • <class> A 3-digit code representing the message class (e.g., 000 for utility messages or 002 for partner integrations).
  • <id> A 5-digit identifier, structured as XXXYY.
  • XXX Our internal partner ID for easy identification (e.g., 001 for LumixTech, 002 for VeloCorp).
  • YY Sequence number for the message, usually incremented in steps of 10 or 5 (e.g., 10 for order submission, 20 for acknowledgment).
 

<direction>

The data flow direction.

  • IN: Inbound
  • OUT: Outbound
  • INT: Internal (non-partner-related utility iflow)
 

<iflowdesc>

A flexible description of the iflow, typically used for partner integrations.

It usually follows the structure:

  • <partner>_<senderAdapter>_<receiverAdapter>_<msgName>

where

  • <partner> A human-readable name for the partner (e.g., LumixTech, VeloCorp).
  • <senderAdapter> and <receiverAdapter> The adapters used (e.g., HTTP, SFTP, ProcessDirect).
  • <msgName> The message or process name (e.g., OrderRequest, InvoiceSubmission).

Example iFlows

Here are two examples of well-named iflows:

SCI00200150_IN_VeloCorp_HTTP_SFTP_OrderRequest

Explanation: This iflow handles an inbound (IN) integration for partner VeloCorp, using HTTP as the sender adapter and SFTP as the receiver adapter, with the message type OrderRequest. Message is from class 002 which can be eg. Partner integration and is 001 is lookup id for partner VeloCorp. This message has its id 50 so orderRequests from VeloCorp and its utility iflow starts with digit 5.

 

SCI00200151_INT_VeloCorp_HTTP_SFTP_OrderRequest_PostProcess

Explanation: This is an internal iflow that serves as a first (51)helper for the OrderRequests (51) integration with VeloCorp, handling PostProcess logic for the OrderRequest message, also using HTTP and SFTP adapters.

 

Why Naming Conventions Matter

Having a consistent naming convention allows for:

  • Easier troubleshooting: Issues can be quickly traced to specific iflows.
  • Improved supportability: The team can easily understand each iflow without needing extensive documentation.
  • Enhanced collaboration: Clear naming rules allow different teams to work on the same integration projects more efficiently.

Standardizing Naming for New Projects

Each project or purpose or team should have its own class number. That class number must be unique. Also ID for partners must be unique for class and ID of message must be unique per partner.

Maintaining a shared list of these IDs and their purposes in a central knowledge base—like Excel, Notion, or Azure DevOps—would ensure clarity and prevent duplication.

 

Conclusion

Following these naming guidelines will make your iflows easier to manage, support, and collaborate on within SAP Cloud Integration. Remember: a little consistency goes a long way!

entry.title: Re: Help with our Project
entry.content: Also, you shouldn't deduce that one person opinion in the forum represents the opinions of all people. Why don't you keep your question here?

entry.title: Re: Demystifying Document Management Service on BTP
entry.content:
I think the information suggesting that storing archive files generated via SARA is probably misleading. We could not get this working and eventually raised a ticket with SAP, only to receive a response that ADK integration to BTP DMS (CMIS) is not part of the feature list:

BTP DMS Service can not be used as Storage Solution for Archive files. CMIS is not supported by ADK (Archive development Kit).
It is not part of the feature list of BTP DMS Service

entry.title: Re: The user's s/4hana public cloud system display is inc...
entry.content: Hello @Enda, I appreciate your help very much.

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial account. Authenication issue when trying to use my own OData service
entry.content:
Hi,

I play with SAP BTP Trial. I was able to develop an CDS model and projection view in Eclipse. Eclipse
was working fine with the trial instance. I have sucessfully published the service as seen on the screenshot.

Now, if I go to BTP I would like to try to generate simple Fiory app using generator.

I entered there an full URL for the service, now I do not know what to enter as Service user name and Service password. I tried to use my account credentional which I use when I login into BTP Trial account but it doesn't work. Where I take these values from please?

entry.title: Re: How to add a calculated field to HCPR?
entry.content:
Hi HH

Do a right click and choose "Create Calculated Field":

This is however only available from BW/4HANA 2.00.

 

br

Roland
